articles.title: Top 5 cryptocurrencies to watch this week: BTC, UNI, THETA, VET, LUNA
articles.description: A bullish technical pattern signals that Bitcoin may be gearing up to retest its all-time high and this positive development is pushing UNI, THETA, VET and LUNA higher.

articles.title: Report: Chainlink May Eventually Eclipse Bitcoin
articles.description: Chainlink is making waves in the crypto and blockchain industry, and now a report by Citi Group is suggesting something even more interesting. articles.title: Pilot Using XRP To Settle Corporate Debts and Credits in Japan Hits New Milestone
articles.description: Japanese financial giant SBI Holdings and crypto startup FXcoin Ltd. are announcing a new achievement in their XRP pilot program. In its digital payments experiment, FXcoin is working with the Japanese general trading firm Sumitomo Corporation to settle debts and credits to other Sumitomo Group companies using XRP. The program has previously had success utilizing […]

articles.title: Publicly-listed beauty apps maker Meitu buys $40 million in BTC, ETH
articles.description: Chinese beauty apps maker Meitu, listed in Hong Kong with 300 million monthly active users, has purchased $40 million worth-of BTC and ETH.

articles.title: Delaware Court Dismisses Lead Investor’s Lawsuit Against Ripple
articles.description: A Delaware court has rejected Tetragon’s appeal to pull out its equity in blockchain payments firm Ripple Labs. Court Stands With Ripple The Delaware Chancery Court court denied Tetragon’s appeal to redeem stock in Ripple as a result of its ongoing battle with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) The court dismissed the case, for the SEC has not yet officially...

articles.title: Crypto Whales Are Quietly Accumulating These Three Altcoins, According to Analytics Firm Santiment
articles.description: Crypto analytics firm Santiment is revealing which altcoins crypto whales have been stockpiling over the past week. In a new report on market conditions, Santiment says that as of March 3rd, the number of whales holding 100+ yearn.finance (YFI) tokens stands at 68, up from 64 the previous week.
